compiled_state.title: RED — Test sync-eval-model-ids.sh rewrites eval config model IDs
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-sync-eval-model-ids.sh testing:
1. Replaces old haiku model ID with new from config
2. Replaces old sonnet model ID with new from config
3. Replaces old opus model ID (including undated like claude-opus-4-5)
4. Handles anthropic:messages: prefix
5. Handles bare claude-* pattern (modelId field)
6. Respects # model-pin skip marker
7. Reports file count
Uses FIXTURE configs and STUB resolve-model-id.sh via PATH override for isolation.

TDD: RED test. Tests fail because sync-eval-model-ids.sh does not exist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED-marked tolerated)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-sync-eval-model-ids.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry
  Verify: grep -q 'sync-eval-model-ids' .test-index
- [ ] RED marker
  Verify: grep -q '\[test-sync-eval-model-ids\]' .test-index
- [ ] Test uses fixture config (not real dso-config.conf)
  Verify: grep -q 'mktemp\|fixture\|WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE' tests/scripts/test-sync-eval-model-ids.sh
